creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
Brand new Apple MacBooks posses a Intel (or Realtek?) HDA audio chip,
namely the 284b8086. They get detected by the snd_hda driver, but output
is always silent. Playback works `normally', but the output is probably
muted somewhere.

Fix: 

None. :-(
How-To-Repeat: I've used various utilities and applications, but sound is always
silent. Refer to the following dmesg for more information about the
device:

	http://junk.g-rave.nl/dmesg-mekker.txt
